अ(, 9दनांक 4 vDrwcj ,2010 का.आ . 958 (अ(, 9दनांक 12 अूैल ,2013 MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27th August, 2013 S.O. 2617(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of Section 14 of the Administrative Tribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1985), the Central Government hereby specifies the 5th September, 2013 as the date on and from which the provisions of sub-section (3) of Section 14 of the said Act shall apply to the National Projects Construction Corporation Limited, being a Public Sector Undertaking within the territory of India and makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions (Department of Personnel and Training) published vide number G.S.R.730(E), dated the 2nd May, 1986, namely :— In the Schedule to the said notification, after serial number 205 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be inserted, namely :— S.No. Name of the Corporation/Society/Other Authority Status 1 2 3 “206. National Projects Construction Corporation Public Sector Undertaking Limited under the Ministry of Water Resources.”. [F. No. P-13030/1/2012-AT] MANOJ JOSHI, Jt. Secy. Note :—The Principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide number G.S.R. 730(E), dated the 2nd May, 1986 and subsequently amended vide following notification numbers :— G.S.R. 1172(E), dated the 31st October, 1986 G.S.R. 84(E), dated the 6th February, 1987 -- 2 of 3 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 G.S.R. 409(E), dated the 20th April, 1987 G.S.R. 542(E), dated the 11th July, 1995 G.S.R. 748(E), dated the 17th December, 1998 G.S.R. 8(E), dated the 4th January, 2002 G.S.R. 499(E), dated the 23rd August, 2006 S.O. 1228(E), dated the 25th July, 2007 S.O. 1823(E), dated the 25th October, 2007 S.O. 906(E), dated the 22nd April, 2008 S.O. 2580(E), dated the 31st October, 2008 S.O. 2824(E), dated the 1st December, 2008 S.O. 727(E), dated the 31st March, 2010 S.O. 2411(E), dated the 4th October, 2010 S.O. 958(E), dated the 12th April, 2013 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 3 of 3 --
